hypothesis: A 12-record ExECT S0/S1 label-policy v4.1 regression slice replays the highest-frequency full-validation failure clusters after v4 slice readback (unsupported-diagnosis rejection, symptomatic structural focal restoration, temporal lobe seizures split) before cap-25 or full validation, without changing scorer semantics.
metric_caveats: This 12-record label-policy regression slice uses record_ids from data/fixtures/exect_s0_label_policy_error_regression_slice.json.
These are partial ExECT S0/S1 diagnostics, not published ExECTv2 benchmark reproduction.
Benchmark-facing fields are limited to audited diagnosis, seizure type, and annotated medication.
Deterministic benchmark bridges may repair fused seizure phrases or diagnosis uncertainty; report bridge flags separately when inspecting artifacts.
Do not extrapolate slice metrics to full-validation performance.
